name: Ai-Code-Summarizer
description: AI-powered code summarizer built with React and Node.js using Google's Gemini API. Supports multiple languages, model selection, and provides detailed token usage and response time.

name: ai-pr-review-bot
description: AI PR Review Bot: Automatically reviews GitHub pull requests using Google Gemini AI, analyzes code quality, maintainability, and potential issues, and posts actionable suggestions directly on the PR.

name: ai-readme-generator
description: Frontend-only AI-powered README generator built with Next.js and Streamdown. Generate, preview, copy, and download README files instantly.

name: all-sem-sgpa
description: This repository contains all of my end-semester result sheets.

name: clerk-auth-custom-flow
description: A full-stack authentication starter kit of Clerk Authentication with a custom flow and ui made with Node.js and Supabase.

name: github-profile-scraper
description: A clean and modern GitHub profile viewer that fetches and displays user info and repositories using the GitHub API.

name: Leak-Disclosure
description: Leak-Disclosure is a professional-grade full-stack SaaS security platform to identify compromised in data breaches. By providing real-time monitoring, automated email alerts, and a comprehensive search engine

name: LifeGrid
description: A wallpaper engine that turns life, year, and goal data into beautiful SVG/PNG wallpapers - built with Cloudflare Pages + Workers + resvg-wasm.

name: LinkShrink
description: A sleek full-stack URL shortener built with React, Express, and Supabase. Supports custom codes, QR generation, and click tracking — complete with rate limiting and validation.

name: Mnist-NumberPrediction
description: A simple and interactive web application that predicts handwritten digits (0-9) using the MNIST dataset. Built with React, Vite, and TensorFlow.js

name: Page-Replacement-Visualizer
description: A web-based tool designed to visualize and analyze different page replacement algorithms, including LRU (Least Recently Used), FIFO (First In First Out), Optimal and LFU (Least Frequently Used).

name: result-scraper
description: DSCE Endsem Results Scraper Automatically fetches student results from the DSCE portal, organizes them by branch, and saves them as CSV.

name: SecFlow
description: AI-driven automated threat analysis pipeline that routes files, URLs, IPs, domains, or images through specialized security analyzers and generates professional PWNDoc reports with integrated YARA and Sigma rule.

name: streamdown
description: A drop-in replacement for react-markdown, designed for AI-powered streaming.

name: Wifi-dos
description: WiFi-DoS is a Python-based Wi-Fi deauthentication tool for authorized security testing. It automates scanning and sending deauth packets using the aircrack-ng suite
